prestazioni: FP FPGreen turbo upgrade (Garrett GT2860RS-5) for the FP 2.0L turbocharged BP-4W engine, supporting 280+ HP with a 300-cell fueling upgrade (Walbro 255 LPH pump + Injector Dynamics ID1000 injectors) and Cobb Accessport V3 flash with custom 93 octane Stage 2+ tune (optimized for 22 PSI peak boost on E85 blend)

Full Mazdaspeed-specific forged internals kit (Manley 87mm forged pistons, Eagle H-beam connecting rods, ACL Race Series bearings) paired with a Tomei 264°/260° camshaft set (intake/exhaust) and Supertech valvetrain (retainers, springs, titanium valves) for 8,500 RPM reliability

Custom 3-inch turbo-back exhaust system (Catted downpipe by Racing Beat with 200-cell GESI catalytic converter, paired with a Vibrant 1798 resonator and Borla Atak muffler) and a Mazdaspeed-specific intercooler upgrade (GReddy Type-S intercooler with custom 2.5-inch silicone couplers and T-bolt clamps)
estetica: Rocket Bunny V1 widebody kit (fiberglass fenders, carbon fiber front bumper, and rear diffuser) with custom 50mm overfenders to fit Work Emotion CR Kiwami wheels (17x9 +35 front, 17x10 +25 rear) wrapped in Toyo R888R 235/40/17 and 265/35/17 tires
Custom carbon fiber hood (Seibon Type-1 with integrated NACA ducts) and rear wing (Aero Catch 996 GT3-style wing with 3D-printed adjustable mounts for 1.5° increments in angle of attack)

Full Mazdaspeed-specific interior overhaul (Recaro SRD-E fixed-back seats with custom bolt-in mounts, NRG Innovations quick-release steering wheel hub, and custom Alcantara-wrapped dashboard with red stitching to match the Mazdaspeed factory seats)
